negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: The audited v2.2 port lacks calculate_audio_fees_phase1(input_len) returning executor, commitment, and zero/minimal inclusion fee for audio Phase 1.
related_but_insufficient_code: lib.rs implements DKMS, ZK, persistent agent, sovereign agent, HTTP, and LLM fee paths, but no calculate_audio_fees_phase1 branch.
constants.rs only has AUDIO_RESPONSE_DURATION_OFFSET and precompile address re-exports, not AUDIO_PHASE1_SETTLEMENT_FEE_WEI.
payload and verifier helpers reject AUDIO_CALL_PRECOMPILE as unsupported two-phase fee parity.

notes: Audio is registered but deliberately rejected from the v2 payload/verifier delivery path.
rationale: The fixed function body defines the complete Phase 1 fee composition for audio jobs and documents that Phase 1 output is only a small job_id. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: calculate_audio_fees_phase1(input_len) must return AsyncFees with executor_fee equal to AUDIO_PHASE1_SETTLEMENT_FEE_WEI, commitment_fee from async_commitment_fee(input_len), and inclusion_fee from async_inclusion_fee(input_len, 64).
suggested_falsification_tests: Call calculate_audio_fees_phase1 with a representative input length and assert the returned AsyncFees fields exactly match AUDIO_PHASE1_SETTLEMENT_FEE_WEI, async_commitment_fee(input_len), and async_inclusion_fee(input_len, 64).
summary: Audio Phase 1 fee composition is not implemented in the audited port.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Call calculate_audio_fees_phase1 with a representative input length and assert the returned AsyncFees fields exactly match AUDIO_PHASE1_SETTLEMENT_FEE_WEI, async_commitment_fee(input_len), and async_inclusion_fee(input_len, 64).
title: Audio Phase 1 fee includes executor, commitment, and minimal inclusion fees
